summary: REAL huge repo: sympy @1.13.3 (~1590 .py files, 43M). A planted one-line bug in the in-repo Tribonacci recurrence helper makes tribonacci numbers wrong. DISCOVERY-HARD: the task gives only a behavioural repro — no test, file, or symbol named — so locating the fix among 1590 files is the real work. Validator = the repo's own test_comb_numbers.py::test_tribonacci.
